mapper.select: SELECT id, openid AS open_id, nick_name, avatar_url, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE openid = #{openId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, openid AS open_id, nick_name, avatar_url, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(openid, nick_name, avatar_url, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{openId}, #{nickName}, #{avatarUrl}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET nick_name = #{nickName}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
